chapter_title.ar: بَابُ زِيَارَةِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/257)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/257)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُتَعَمِّداً فَقَالَ لَهُ الْجَنَّةُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Abu Najran who said,
‘I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! What is for the one who, purposely, visits Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For him is the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn abu Najran who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ’What is the reward for one who visits the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, voluntarily?’ He (the Imam) replied, ’The reward for him is paradise.’”
